title: bidens pilosa var. radiata
intro: Bidens pilosa var. radiata, also known as Radiant Beggarticks, is a plant species within the Bidens genus, characterized by its radiating stems and leaves with a hairy texture. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa var. radiata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical application, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
